data.name: 我被巨乳鬼魂襲擊了
data.detailed_description:
雖然是令人感到恐懼的鬼魂，既然是巨乳，也只能跟她交配了！本會知遭遇性命之危，卻用雞雞讓她屈服！
因為是鬼魂，所以沒有任何人權，可以隨心所欲做愛，簡直就是理想的玩物！


讓巨乳妖怪成為玩物的性生活！得手巨乳肉便器後每天只想著做愛！實現了這般自甘墮落的性生活！

就看你能不能把這個可怕的鬼魂從大街上弄走 把她變成你床單上吮吸精液的鬼魂了 快去把那個女鬼搞到手吧！
[列表]
  • 日本原始視覺小說的翻譯版本
  • Tsutako 完全由原版日文對白配音
  • 原畫高清升級為 16:9 和 4:3 版本
  • 數小時的故事內容
  • 音頻，包括音樂和特效
  • 增強的角色精靈動畫
  • 圖庫和場景選擇
  • 擁有迄今為止所有米爾遊戲中最大的胸部！ [/列表］
    我被巨乳鬼魂襲擊了是日本開發商 Miel 原創的視覺小說的英文本地化版本。 Cherry Kiss 的目標是為日本以外的玩家提供原汁原味的日本視覺小說體驗。

    **請注意**
    本遊戲中所描述和直觀表現的所有角色均已年滿 18 歲，在本遊戲的製作過程中沒有使用任何實際或可識別的未成年人。

data.supported_languages:

*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

data.name: Ghost Girl Ghussy: XXXL Edition
data.detailed_description:
There’s a rumor around town of a giant woman haunting the streets, wearing a white dress as her long black hair obscures her face… Eight feet tall and with a lust for the blood of young men… Well! This young man has plenty to give, and quite frankly, she sounds hot as hell! This countryside is seriously lacking in viable young women, so why not go for the dead instead? A giant ghost gal just means all the more body to play with, as her massive tits swing with every step.

She falls easily to our adrenaline-fueled protagonist, his fight-or-fuck instinct kicked in, and Tsutako was not expecting a sudden rock-hard counter attack! Sinking into her tender ghost flesh, he’ll be able to experience pleasures out of this world! Nuh-uh, no sinking into the shadows for you, Tsutako, you’re gonna be our spectral sex toy whether you want it or not! Teach her the joys of the flesh, and take this ghost as your afterlife wife! The power of cock commands her!

It's up to you to get that fearsome phantom off the streets, and turn her into a sperm slurping specter in your sheets! Go on and get that ghost girl ghussy!
  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Tsutako is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • Featuring the biggest boobies in any Miel game to date!

Ghost Girl Ghussy: XXXL edition Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Reaching unheard of levels of horniness our protagonist will settle for anything; if it has a hole, that's the goal! So of course, after hearing the urban legend of a giant ghost girl in his neighborhood our would-be ghost hunter hits the streets searching for this sexy specter!
data.supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese*, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
